problem id: 709930e0
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(1) AND NOT SHL(6)

examples:
  10000000 -> 00000001
  00111101 -> 00111010
  11011110 -> 00111101
  10110010 -> 01100101
  01011011 -> 00110110
  00001100 -> 00011000
  10111011 -> 00110111
  11101110 -> 01011101
  10110001 -> 00100011
  11011001 -> 10110011

query: 01101101
predicted answer: 10011010
